headline: It’s the last day of Prime Day — here are over 140 great deals to choose from
summary: Today marks the final day of Prime Day deals. Discover over 140 discounts on various gadgets, including TVs, smart home tech, and headphones. Popular items are selling out quickly, so act fast.

headline: These are the best deals you can still get on MacBooks before Apple’s price hike kicks in
summary: Apple has raised prices on Macs and iPads due to rising memory chip costs. Existing Prime Day discounts on MacBooks are now significantly more valuable. Seize these enhanced deals before the price hikes fully apply.

headline: Our 36 favorite gaming deals on Prime Day for Switch, PS5, and Xbox
summary: Prime Day offers substantial discounts on new and recent games for Nintendo Switch 2, PlayStation 5, and Xbox Series X/S. Find great prices on both physical and digital game copies. Explore 36 top gaming deals before they're gone.

headline: The beautiful shame
summary: Trump-era immigration policies prevented many World Cup attendees from traveling to the US. Would-be visitors from Africa, Asia, and the Middle East faced visa exclusions. Policies are described as 'nakedly racist' for denying entry.

headline: This Is My Favorite Amazon Product, And It's Better Than Half Price for Prime Day (Last Chance to Save)
summary: The Amazon Fire TV Stick 4K with Alexa Voice Remote is currently over 50% off. This highly-rated product is a favorite, offering significant savings. This is your last opportunity to grab this Prime Day deal.

headline: 10 Gifts to Buy Yourself Before Amazon Prime Day Ends
summary: Discover 10 recommended items to treat yourself this Prime Day. Act quickly to take advantage of these special offers. Don't miss out on these gifts before the sale concludes.

headline: The Tiny TMNT Arcade Cabinet Hit Its Lowest Price of the Year During Prime Day
summary: The miniature Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles arcade cabinet is at its lowest price ever. This limited-time Prime Day offer is a must-have for collectors. Grab this deal before it disappears.

headline: The Highly-Rated Bambu Lab P1S Combo Multi-Color 3D Printer Drops to $499.99 for Prime Day
summary: The Bambu Lab P1S Combo Multi-Color 3D Printer is on sale for $499.99. This highly-rated printer is excellent for both novices and professionals. Secure this advanced 3D printer at a Prime Day discount.

headline: Hottest June day record broken for third day in row as temperature hits 37.3C
summary: A new June temperature record was set for the third consecutive day. Suffolk recorded the highest temperature at 37.3C on Friday. The intense heatwave is expected to ease over the weekend.

headline: US conducts strikes on Iran after attack on cargo ship
summary: US Central Command carried out strikes against Iran. The action was in response to an attack on a cargo ship. Targets included Iranian missile and drone storage facilities, plus coastal radar positions.

headline: Court rules 13 men who allegedly helped rapist drug and abuse wife can be named
summary: A court has ruled that 13 men can be publicly named. These men are accused of assisting a rapist in drugging and abusing his wife over several years. The decision allows greater transparency in the ongoing case.

headline: Mother dies saving daughter in Venezuela earthquakes
summary: A mother tragically died saving her daughter during recent Venezuela earthquakes. Her sacrifice was confirmed on social media by Héctor Bello. The devastating quakes claimed at least 920 lives.
